items.name: Gem-Set Gold Necklace
items.description: Ornate South Indian gold necklace set with rows of rubies, emeralds and seed pearls, finished with a circular gem-set pendant and a fine triple-chain gold back strap.

attribution.title: Necklace, The Metropolitan Museum of Art

items.name: Gold Filigree Bead Necklace
items.description: Single-strand necklace of round filigree gold beads in graduating sizes with a darker spherical clasp bead.
items.prompt_hint: The product photo also shows a pair of matching drop earrings; apply ONLY the bead necklace, ignore the earrings.

attribution.title: Necklace and Pair of Earrings, The Metropolitan Museum of Art

items.name: Gold Cross Pendant Necklace
items.description: Byzantine-style gold chain necklace of flattened oval links with two filigree medallions near the clasp and an embossed gold cross pendant.

attribution.title: Necklace with Pendant Cross, The Metropolitan Museum of Art

items.name: Coral & Gold Coin Collar Necklace
items.description: Collar-style necklace of orange-red coral beads alternating with dangling engraved gold coins on a dark oxidized metal chain.

items.name: Gold Drop Earrings
items.description: Pair of hammered gold drop earrings, each made of two interlocking gold rings with a beaded cap and three teardrop-shaped gold pendants hanging from fine chains.

attribution.title: Earring (One of a Pair), The Metropolitan Museum of Art

items.name: Classic Gold Hoop Earrings
items.description: Smooth, thick polished gold hoop earrings with a rounded tubular profile and a small tapered opening.
items.prompt_hint: The product photo shows a single hoop; render it as a matching pair, one hoop worn on each ear.

attribution.title: Hoop Earring, The Metropolitan Museum of Art

items.name: Three-Stone Diamond Ring
items.description: White-gold three-stone diamond ring with round brilliant-cut diamonds in prong settings, the center stone slightly larger than the two side stones.
items.prompt_hint: The product photo shows two rings; apply ONLY the three-stone diamond ring, ignore the plain band.

attribution.title: Wedding rings photo by Litho Printers

items.name: Gold Filigree Statement Ring
items.description: Statement gold ring with a rectangular openwork filigree face decorated with fine granulated scrollwork on a wide gold band.

attribution.title: Ring, The Metropolitan Museum of Art

items.name: Mughal Enamel Bangle
items.description: Mughal-style open cuff bangle in rich green enamel set with gold-rimmed ruby-red stones, a red-and-white floral enamel inner band, ending in two stylized gem-set bud finials.

attribution.title: Inlaid bangle bracelet, 18th-19th century, Cooper Hewitt / Smithsonian

items.name: Gold Spiral Wrap Bracelet
items.description: Gold spiral wrap bracelet of four smooth coils of round gold wire, finished with small flattened cone finials at both ends.

attribution.title: Spiral bracelet, Musee national du Moyen Age (Cl.9245)
